questions.question: What is the maximum level you can have in a single class in Dungeons and Dragons (5e)?
In a standard game of Monopoly, what colour are the two cheapest properties?
When was the board game Twister, released to the public?
What letter is used to refer to blue mana in the card game Magic The Gathering?
In "Magic: The Gathering", what instant card has the highest converted mana cost?
Some of the "Fallen Empires" cards from "Magic: The Gathering" were misprinted on the backs of which other card game?
In which cooperative board game do players work together to treat infections and find cures for four diseases before a global outbreak occurs?
questions.explanation: Pandemic is a widely popular cooperative board game designed by Matt Leacock. Players must collaborate to manage disease outbreaks and find cures, offering a thrilling experience of teamwork and strategy. Its engaging mechanics make it a favorite among board game enthusiasts.

questions.question: In the board game 'Dungeons & Dragons', what is the name of the die typically used to determine initiative, the order of turns during combat?
questions.explanation: In Dungeons & Dragons, initiative is determined by rolling a twenty-sided die, commonly referred to as a D20. The result helps decide the order in which players and monsters act during combat, making it a crucial element of gameplay strategy.
